input_area.style: bg-surface border border-border rounded-xl p-4 flex flex-col gap-3
input_area.button: bg-primary text-white font-bold rounded-lg py-3 px-4 flex items-center justify-center gap-2

profile_shortcut_card.style: bg-surface border border-border rounded-xl p-3 flex items-center gap-3 active:scale-95 transition-transform
profile_shortcut_card.avatar: w-12 h-12 rounded-full object-cover border border-border
profile_shortcut_card.badge: absolute -top-1 -right-1 bg-primary w-3 h-3 rounded-full border-2 border-background

media_grid_item.style: relative aspect-[9/16] bg-surface rounded-md overflow-hidden border border-border
media_grid_item.checkbox: absolute top-2 right-2 w-5 h-5 rounded border-2 border-white/50 bg-black/50 checked:bg-primary checked:border-primary
media_grid_item.badge: absolute bottom-2 left-2 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-md text-white text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded flex items-center gap-1
media_grid_item.downloaded_overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-black/40 flex items-center justify-center backdrop-blur-[2px]

fab.style: fixed bottom-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-primary text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 shadow-[0_0_24px_rgba(0,122,255,0.4)] flex items-center gap-2 font-bold z-50

bottom_tab_navigator.style: bg-surface border-t border-border flex justify-around items-center h-16 pb-safe
bottom_tab_navigator.item: flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-full h-full gap-1

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Manrope for headings and Inter for body text.

Follow the Archetype 2 Performance Pro palette: Deep Obsidian (#0A0A0A) background with Electric Blue (#007AFF) accents for all primary actions. This ensures a tactical, high-visibility, fast utility look.
Implement a bottom tab navigator for Home, Profiles, Queue, Gallery, Settings. Maintain dark surface backgrounds with borders to avoid visual bleeding.
The media grid must use exactly 3 columns with a 9:16 aspect ratio (TikTok style) and very tight 2px gaps, matching the provided layout spec.
Ensure ALL interactive and key informational elements have a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='url-paste-button', data-testid='media-grid-item', data-testid='profile-shortcut-card').
For multi-select mode, show a checkbox on top right of each media item. If already downloaded, dim the thumbnail and show a success overlay with a check icon to avoid redundant downloads.
Use Phosphor Icons (regular weight) for all UI iconography.
The app must feel fast, dense, and avoid unnecessary paddings. Card internal padding should be p-3 max. Utilize the 'badge' component style for video type/length indicators on media thumbs.
Use safe area padding (e.g. pb-safe in Tailwind via native safe-area-context) since this is a mobile web app / Expo app.
